description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python base image with a global before_script that downloads get-pip.py, runs it, and upgrades setuptools. Define two stages, test and release, and set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. In the release stage add a build job that runs only on develop and before_0.9 branches, executes pip install devpi-client, removes dist and build directories, configures devpi to https://pkgs.frkl.io/, logs in with $DEVPI_PASSWORD, selects the /frkl/dev index and uploads the package, and stores the dist/ directory as an artifact for 1 month. Add build_beta and build_stable jobs that run only on version tags matching the regex patterns for beta and stable releases respectively (excluding branch pipelines), perform the same devpi steps but use /frkl/beta or /frkl/stable, then upload the generated .tar.gz and .whl files to Gemfury via curl using $GEMFURY_TOKEN, and also keep dist/ as a 1‑month artifact. In the test stage add a commitlint job using the node:8 image that runs only on master, merge_requests, and develop, installs @commitlint/cli and @commitlint/config-conventional globally, determines the last git tag, and runs commitlint from that tag; also add a flake8 job using the python image that installs tox and runs tox -e flake8, and add python27, python35, python36, python37 jobs each using the corresponding python:<version> image, installing tox and running tox -e py27/py35/py36/py37 respectively.
